name: Umbrosa

skills.name: Whirling Featherblades
skills.description:
When attacking at a distance, Basic Attacks throw a blade that returns to her. She can hit the blade as it returns to bounce it back at the enemy, dealing increased damage with each rebound.
When attacking nearby targets, she enters melee mode and attacks faster.
Basic Attacks mark targets. Marked enemies take extra damage from Skill 2.

skills.name: Feverish Dance
skills.description: Sweeps the surrounding area, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Then enters Frenzied state, gaining a major boost to Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Feathered Tempest
skills.description:
Dashes forward, damaging and knocking back enemies. Also triggers Featherblade marks and spreads them to nearby enemies.
Then, throws rebounding blades at enemies in front, dealing damage and recovering Health. Each hit consumes 1 mark to deal extra damage.

skills.name: Final Frenzy
skills.description:
Damages nearby enemies and gains Movement Speed. Also enters the Indomitable state for 4s, gaining temporary Health.
If she is defeated while this skill is not on cooldown, she resurrects after a short delay, damaging nearby enemies. The skill will then enter cooldown.
Passive: Upgrading this skill increases Skill 2 and melee Basic Attack damage. The Indomitable state ends immediately if she loses all of her temporary Health.

skillsZh.name: 羽刃迴旋
skillsZh.description:
目標較遠時，影普攻會迴旋扔出飛刃，收回飛刃後，才可繼續遠程攻擊。影可在飛刃即將收回時，提前使用普攻，加速向前，並立即回彈飛刃再次攻擊。連續回彈飛刃，每次都會提升傷害。
目標較近時，影會進入近戰狀態，提高攻擊頻率。
每次普攻會對目標疊加印記，目標遭到【翎羽風暴】命中時，會受到額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 狂熱舞步
skillsZh.description: 影橫掃一圈，對圓形範圍內的敵人造成傷害和減速，之後進入狂熱狀態，期間獲得大量移速和攻速。

skillsZh.name: 翎羽風暴
skillsZh.description:
影向前突進造成傷害和擊退，同時激發命中敵人的全部羽刃印記，並傳遞印記至附近的敵人。
隨後對前方範圍內敵人大量彈射飛刃，造成傷害和回復，每次命中會消耗1層目標的印記，額外造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 最後的狂舞
skillsZh.description:
影對附近敵人造成傷害，增加移速。同時影會進入4秒不屈狀態，獲得臨時生命值。
若影在3技能非冷卻期陣亡，則影會緩緩復活，對附近敵人造成傷害，並使得3技能進入冷卻。
被動：之後升級本技能，會增加【翎羽風暴】和近戰普攻的傷害，若臨時生命值消耗殆盡，則會提前結束不屈狀態。

tips: Build: Pure Sky, Demonsbane, Sage's Sanctuary.
tipsZh: 影（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 50.16%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：純淨蒼穹、破魔刀、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 49.5%, pick 0.6%, ban 0.1%, tier B.
Strong into Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi · Weak into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun.
Umbrosa sits at Tier B globally (49.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Umbrosa good in current season?
faqs.answer: Umbrosa is Tier B Warrior with 50.16% win rate, 0.66% pick rate, and 0.06% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Umbrosa build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Pure Sky, Demonsbane, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Succubus Cloak, Starbreaker.

faqs.question: How to counter Umbrosa?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun. Strong into Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi.

faqsZh.question: 影 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 影 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.16%、選取 0.66%、禁用 0.06%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 影 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：純淨蒼穹、破魔刀、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、魔女斗篷、碎星錘.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 影？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun。影 克制 Sakeer、Angela、Guiguzi。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi. Weak into: Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Sakeer、Angela、Guiguzi；被克制：Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun

guide.overview: Umbrosa is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 49.5% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Umbrosa: Mark Damage When attacking at a distance, Basic Attacks throw a blade that returns to her.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Master Sword, then complete Pure Sky, Eternity Blade, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Umbrosa's Warrior kit. Take Flash & Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Feverish Dance → Feathered Tempest → Final Frenzy → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Final Frenzy (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Feverish Dance, and Final Frenzy on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Feverish Dance → Feathered Tempest → Final Frenzy → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Umbrosa sits at Tier B globally (49.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Umbrosa vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 3.1% more often globally. Choose Umbrosa when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Umbrosa vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Chicha wins 0.7% more often globally. Choose Umbrosa when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Umbrosa excels into Sakeer, Angela, Guiguzi. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.
